title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami tries to cut herself off from Luffy’s crew while Zoro and the others see that something is wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sigh.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nice mess you've made for me, Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's Wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nothing! I only came to take a little rest, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you've only come to take a little rest,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then there's no need for you to be breaking all the glass and furniture.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And why would you be staring so intently at that treasure map if there was nothing wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Didn't you promise to tell me everything?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I just lost my cool a bit, that's all!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was them, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Who are they?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You've met them?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just the captain.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But he seemed like a liar.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So they've come to bring you back...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can see why she'd get so upset.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Friends, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's the one word...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that hurts you more than anything.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Did Nami do this to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uh no. That was actually because of him and I.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You mean just you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah, Luffyy! You're here too?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've decided to come Arlong too. Nice to meet you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You...! I'll kill you one of these days!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: In any case, the problem is Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She saved my life.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you ask me,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: There must be some reason why she ended up joining the Arlong pirates!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
